name: MSI MEG X570S UNIFY-X MAX ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD X570 Chipset - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR4-5300(OC) - 6x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - 2.5G Gaming LAN (X570SUNXMAX)
shortName: MSI MEG X570S UNIFY-X MAX ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD X570
description: High-end ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen with X570 chipset, 6 M.2 slots, and PCIe 4.0 support.
